subject: List of supported documents is wrong
analysis: User reported that PPTX files work for upload but aren't listed in the supported document types display. The fix was already committed on branch email/2026-03-28-fix-pptx-label (commit 3496ac1: 'Fix: Include PPTX in supported file types display'). Pushed branch and created PR #76.
draft_reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for pointing that out! You're absolutely right — PPTX files have been supported for a while, but we hadn't updated our documentation to reflect that. Great catch!

We've pushed a fix to update the supported file types display so it now correctly shows PPTX alongside PPT. The change is live shortly.

Thanks again for taking the time to report this — it really helps us improve!

Nelson – CuizAI
notes: Fix was already prepared on the branch before this task was processed. PR #76 created and pushed.
